inferential_statistics.null_hypothesis: Semantic prompt variation has no significant effect on mean pixel error.
inferential_statistics.alternative_hypothesis: Prompt phrasing significantly alters the model's spatial grounding accuracy.
inferential_statistics.conclusion: Since the p-value 6.2244e-01 is greater than the standard significance level (α=0.05), we fail to reject the null hypothesis, suggesting our data is statistically consistent with the model being robust to semantic prompt shifts.
